User-initiated order actions ALREADY invalidate react-query (Positions close -> positions+orderbook; OrderBook cancel/modify -> orderbook); practical gap is async broker-side fills only

Per loop rule, NOT invented autonomously. Safe incremental alternative pending approval: a shared invalidate-all-order-queries helper called by every order mutation (place/basket/split/close/cancel/modify)
Reference Files: openalgo frontend/src/hooks/useOrderEventRefresh.ts; openbull backend/websocket_proxy/server.py (would host the channel)
